case_title: CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. EDDIE PENNES ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-27-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-29-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
